<!-- SPEC-MANAGED: projects/jet/tech-design/semantic/jet-projects-jet.md#schema -->
<!-- CODEGEN-BEGIN -->
# jet Agent Context

> TD-first map for agents. Start from tech design and capability intent before implementation files.

## Tech Design

- [Tech Design](../../.aw/tech-design/projects/jet): implementation source of truth.
- Validate: `aw td check .aw/tech-design/projects/jet`.

## Capability Map

- [README](README.md): capability source of truth and product contract.

## Agent Workflow

- Continue: `aw run --project jet`.
- Next managed step: `aw standardize managed next --project jet`.
- Readiness: `aw health --project jet`.

## Commands

- Build debug: `./build.sh debug`.
- Build release: `./build.sh release`.
- Install: repo root `install.sh --project=jet` dispatches to `./install.sh`.
- Test: `cargo test -p jet`.
- Test: `npm --cache /private/tmp/aw-npm-cache/react-bench --prefix examples/react-bench ci --ignore-scripts && cargo test -p jet -p jet-wasm`.

## Root Artifacts

- [llms.txt](llms.txt): generated by `aw standardize managed run`.
- [build.sh](build.sh): debug/release build entrypoint.
- [install.sh](install.sh): project-local install entrypoint.
<!-- CODEGEN-END -->
